query: mutation CreateLookbookDefinition($definition: MetaobjectDefinitionCreateInput!) { metaobjectDefinitionCreate(definition: $definition) { metaobjectDefinition { id type name } userErrors { field message } } }

definition.name: Lookbook
definition.description: Editorial lookbook entry. Renders as a hero image + description + featured product grid.

fieldDefinitions.name: Hero Image
fieldDefinitions.description: Primary editorial image displayed at the top of the lookbook card.

fieldDefinitions.name: Description
fieldDefinitions.description: Short editorial copy for the look.

fieldDefinitions.name: Featured Products
fieldDefinitions.description: Products shown in this look. Up to 6.

fieldDefinitions.name: Published Date
fieldDefinitions.description: Date this look was published. Used for display and sorting.
